special_mechanics.name: Speed Variance by Character
special_mechanics.description: The Four Bomber Kings and Great Bomber have decreased speed for ten seconds after using their unique abilities

special_mechanics.name: Bomb Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Players can lay bombs to destroy enemies. Bombs can be punched, kicked, picked up, and thrown. Explosions harm all entities including the bomb's placer

special_mechanics.name: Creature Riding
special_mechanics.description: Defeated enemies turn into eggs. When picked up, players can ride creatures (organic or mechanical types)

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Only qualitative gameplay information available from Wikipedia. No quantitative physics data (movement speeds, gravity, acceleration, sub-pixel systems) documented in source material. Game focuses on bomb-laying mechanics and multiplayer battle rather than detailed movement physics.
